elementCounters.note: Attacker's element deals 200% damage to the element it counters, 50% to the element that counters it

auraEffects.Lightning: Increases ATK SPD of all allies
auraEffects.Water: Recovers HP for all allies passively
auraEffects.Grass: Increases Max HP of all allies
auraEffects.Rock: Reduces damage taken by all allies

LightningSpeed.name: Lightning speed comp
LightningSpeed.strategy: Rapid attacks + unlimited pierce + invincibility support. Fights end fast.
LightningSpeed.weakness: Rock/Earth enemies counter the entire comp

WaterSustain.name: Water sustain comp
WaterSustain.strategy: Passive HP regen + sleep CC + damage amp on wake. Nearly unkillable.

FireAggro.name: Fire aggro comp
FireAggro.strategy: Stack Fire Aura ATK buffs + Weaken debuffs. Shred waves before pressure builds.

GrassControl.name: Grass control comp
GrassControl.strategy: Stun CC + Max HP aura + invincible dash disruptor. Zone denial wins.
GrassControl.weakness: Fire burns through Grass units fast

gameModes.Campaign: Standard progression. Always check enemy element before locking in. Boss appears at end on centre line.
gameModes.HordeInvasion: Co-op survival. Bring highest DPS. Survival over control.
gameModes.BadgeDojo: Single element per run. Know your mono-element comps. Best rewards in game.
gameModes.GoldRush: Speed mode. AoE and multi-hit Tatari excel.

formationRules.frontline: Tanks and Guardians — absorb damage, protect DPS
formationRules.midline: Support and CC — safe from front pressure, covers multiple lanes
formationRules.backline: Primary DPS and Healers — maximum safety for carries

teamStructure.ideal: 1 frontline tank/guardian + 1 primary DPS carry + 1 CC/support + 1 aura provider + 1 flex
teamStructure.auraRule: Mono-element team maximises aura uptime. 4+1 split is safer if enemy counters your element.
teamStructure.evolutionRule: T3/T4 unlocks game-changing mechanics. A T3 common beats a T1 rare every time.
teamStructure.resourceRule: Pick 3-4 core Tatari and rush their evolution. Never spread upgrade materials.

statusEffects.Sleep: Upgraded from Slow — fully disables enemies, extra damage on wake
statusEffects.Scouted: Enemies take burst damage proportionate to total damage taken when effect expires

pinballMechanics.overview: Launch-based combat — aim Tatari at enemies using trajectory angles
pinballMechanics.bankShots: Well-angled bank shot hits multiple enemies, triggers chain damage, builds ultimate faster
pinballMechanics.heavyUnits: Maintain momentum after launch, punch through clusters
pinballMechanics.lightUnits: Bounce unpredictably — advantage on spread formations
